chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 4741 of 2022 along with C.P Nos. D- 4788, 4795, 4961, 4962, 5289, 6031, 7118, 7119, 7126, 7150, 7926 & 7927 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 20147/22. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.08.2023. Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for respondents. -------------- It appears that in these matters, the Sales Tax Registration of the Petitioners were suspended allegedly without issuing any notice, which issue has been decided by this Court in the case reported as Saleem Ahmed & others Vs. Federation of Pakistan and others (2021 PTD 1813). On the basis of such judgment, interim orders were passed and suspension orders were suspended. Since then these petitions are pending. It is informed that Show Cause Notices have been issued and Petitioners have been confronted. In view of such position, all these Petitions are disposed of by directing the Petitioners to respond to the said Show Cause Notices, whereafter, Respondents shall pass appropriate orders after affording opportunity of hearing to the Petitioners in accordance with law. With these observations these petitions stand disposed of with pending applications. Office to place copy of this order in the connected petitions, as above. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
